message:
Running command: # ABC running for ~4 minutes now. Log paused at 22MB (normal during ABC).
# ABC technology mapping for this large design: estimate 30-90 min
# Set a background nohup monitor and use long waits
cat > /tmp/lr_monitor.sh << 'MONITOR_EOF'
#!/bin/bash
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
STATUS="/tmp/lr_status.log"
LR_PID=286668
echo "Monitor start $(date)" > "$STATUS"
while true; do
  sleep 120  # 2 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  ABC=$(pgrep -f "yosys-abc" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  OR=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP log=${LOG_BYTES} ABC=${ABC:-done} OR=${OR:-none}" >> "$STATUS"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "FINAL_GDS=$FINAL_GDS" >> "$STATUS"
  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "LIBRELANE_COMPLETE at $(date)" >> "$STATUS"
    tail -30 "$LOG" >> "$STATUS"
    break
  fi
done
MONITOR_EOF
chmod +x /tmp/lr_monitor.sh
nohup /tmp/lr_monitor.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Background monitor started. PID=$!"
echo "Status: /tmp/lr_status.log"

# Now wait 1h in foreground
echo "Waiting 1h for synthesis + early PnR..."
sleep 3600
echo "=== 1h check: $(date) ==="
tail -10 /tmp/lr_status.log
echo ""
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10

function.name: execute_bash
